description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a rich brown finish, extending from the butt to the fore-end, giving it a traditional and robust appearance. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with visible iron sights mounted along the top of the barrel for aiming. The bolt-action mechanism is prominent, with a rounded bolt handle protruding from the right side, indicating manual cycling of the action. The trigger guard and magazine area are also metallic, with the magazine integrated into the rifle's body, likely of the internal type. The muzzle is simple, with no visible attachments, and the overall design is streamlined for practical use. The rifle's finish is matte, with subtle grain texture on the wood and a smooth, slightly reflective metal surface.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and dark metal barrel, featuring iron sights and an integrated magazine. The design is traditional, with a matte finish and visible bolt handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metal barrel, and bolt handle.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view showing the rifle's width and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal barrel, and the bolt handle from the other side.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the alignment of the barrel, iron sights, and the bolt handle's position.
